reviews.review_description: Ripped Gorilla Tag models. Lazy map using only cubes and materials; at least use ProBuilder. The player model is from sketchfab, and only the arms change color; it has no face textures. Also, horror’s jumpscare is just ear rape. I didn’t play the rest because the first jumpscare already gave me a headache. Also, I could easily tell this is your first game, so here is some advice: DON’T make your first game gorilla locomotion. Learn a 3D modeling software like Blender or Maya so your game doesn’t look like hell, learn C#, don’t use code from dev hubs, and finally, start off with other projects with normal joystick locomotion so you can practice.
